title: Pai Inla, Jesuh Kiang Gen In!

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Jesuh kiang pai in na mawhna gen in,
Na nuntakna ding Ama thu um in;
Na lungsim vangik
hong zangsak ding hi,
Topa en in na mawh hong phel ding hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Jesuh kiang pai in,
na mawhnate gen in,
Ama lam nga-in na mawh hong phel ding hi;
Jesuh kiang pai in, Ama lam zuan
in,
Na mawh gen in, Topa’n hogn phel thei ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Jesuh kiang pai in na mawhna
lian hi,
Na mawhna mualcia-in a liat hangin;
Mawhna phel ding hi, nuamna ngah
na’ngin,
Topa Jesuh a si luang ciamteh in.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Jesuh kiang pai in na launa gen
in,
Na lau lohna ding, A ang hong pom ding;
Upna khangsak in, na khitui nul hi,
A tawntung
nuam in na lungdam ding hi.
